name: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Cat Allergy Control Salmon 2kg
description: How it works: Uniform (salmon) protein source, Content rich in hydrolyzed proteins, High digestibility, Marigold extract (anti-inflammatory and antiseptic), Coconut oil (skin and coat health). Hydrolyzed Protein Dalton weight is less than 1000 Dalton. Ingredients Salmon Protein, Hydrolyzed Salmon Protein, Yellow Pea, Brown Rice, Salmon Oil, Pea Protein, Sugar Beet Pulp, Coconut Oil, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Probiotic, Dried Algae, MOS, ?-Glucan, Tocopherol, Marigold Extract, Yucca, Wild Seed. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
